description_long: This object consists of two minimalist, modern side tables or open shelving units, each with a square top and a lower shelf, supported by a thin, black metal frame. The design is geometric and open, with no doors, drawers, or enclosed compartments, allowing for easy access from all sides. The larger unit features two levels, while the smaller unit has a single surface, both with flat, solid tops and shelves. The frame is constructed from slender, tubular or square-section metal, likely steel, finished in a matte or semi-matte black. The surfaces appear to be made of a solid, possibly wood or engineered wood panel, also finished in black to match the frame. The overall aesthetic is industrial and functional, suitable for urban environments such as sidewalks, parks, or modern public spaces.
description: A pair of modern, open-frame black metal side tables or shelves with flat tops and minimalist design, featuring one and two levels respectively.
description_view_0: Two black open-frame tables or shelves, one taller with two levels and one shorter with a single level, viewed from an angle showing both tops and side profiles.
description_view_1: Front view of the taller unit, clearly showing its two-level structure and open frame, with the smaller unit partially visible behind.
description_view_2: Angled view highlighting the depth and open sides of both units, with the taller unit's shelf and the smaller unit's single surface visible.
description_view_3: Direct view along the length of both units, emphasizing the open, rectangular frames and the alignment of the tops.
